inputs.label: Distance (meters)
inputs.businessContext: Total walking distance in meters, e.g., from one workstation to another in a factory layout.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total walking distance in meters, e.g., from one workstation to another in a factory layout.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metre cinsinden toplam yürüme mesafesi, örn. bir fabrika düzeninde bir iş istasyonundan diğerine.

inputs.label: Time (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Hours part of the walking time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hours part of the walking time.

inputs.label: Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Minutes part of the walking time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minutes part of the walking time.

inputs.label: Time (seconds)
inputs.businessContext: Seconds part of the walking time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Seconds part of the walking time.

inputs.label: Stride Length (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Optional: average stride length in centimeters for step-based distance calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional: average stride length in centimeters for step-based distance calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı: adım tabanlı mesafe hesaplaması için santimetre cinsinden ortalama adım uzunluğu.

inputs.label: Steps
inputs.businessContext: Optional: number of steps taken. Used with stride length to estimate distance if distance is not directly entered.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional: number of steps taken. Used with stride length to estimate distance if distance is not directly entered.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı: atılan adım sayısı. Mesafe doğrudan girilmezse adım uzunluğu ile mesafe tahmini için kullanılır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
